---
title: "Contact"
---

Feel free to get in touch.

- Email: `sml [at] dal [dot] ca`
- PGP key: [keys.openpgp.org](https://keys.openpgp.org/search?q=sml@dal.ca)

## Office

Faculty of Computer Science  
Goldberg Computer Science Building  
6050 University Avenue  
Halifax, Nova Scotia, Canada

<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d2839.0239000750557!2d-63.58978968845299!3d44.63742848810088!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x4b5a223ad085ad5d%3A0xb816348d562d66b!2sGoldberg%20Computer%20Science%20Bldg%2C%206050%20University%20Ave%2C%20Halifax%2C%20NS%20B3H%201W5!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sca!4v1726980774344!5m2!1sen!2sca" width="100%" height="360" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
